category.description: High-level domain, e.g. ifrs9, crr, banca_ditalia, banks, eba

subcategory.description: Optional finer-grained tag, e.g. sicr, pillar3

target.description: Expected (supervised) answer or label. Empty string allowed for no-answer examples

expected_sources.description: List of source filenames or identifiers used as provenance

rationale.description: Optional short rationale for the annotation

language.description: Language code, e.g. it or en
